User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Eritas Gateway application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

signUpDate.description: The date and time when the user signed up.

lastLogin.description: The date and time when the user last logged in.

profilePicture.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

googleId.description: Google identifier for users who signed up using Google.

UserPreferences.title: User Preferences
UserPreferences.description: Stores all user-specific settings, preferences, and data.

Trip.title: Trip
Trip.description: Represents a single bus trip booked by a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who booked the trip.

driverId.description: The ID of the driver assigned to the trip.

busId.description: The ID of the bus for the trip.

busPlate.description: The license plate of the bus.

status.description: The current status of the trip.

currentBusLocation.description: The real-time location of the bus, updated by the driver's app.

eta.description: Estimated time of arrival in minutes.

GeoPoint.title: GeoPoint
GeoPoint.description: Represents a geographical point with latitude and longitude.

Bus.title: Bus
Bus.description: Represents a single bus, broadcasted by a driver app.

id.description: Unique identifier for the bus document (usually the driver's ID).

driver.description: The name of the bus driver.

plate.description: The license plate of the bus.

eta.description: Estimated time of arrival to the next major stop in minutes.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Path-based ownership is enforced, allowing each user to only access their own document.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores a single document containing all preferences for a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: prefsId
params.description: The unique identifier of the preferences document.

definition.description: Stores individual trip documents, accessible by both users and drivers.

params.name: tripId
params.description: The unique identifier of the trip.

definition.description: Stores live data for active buses, broadcasted by drivers. All authenticated users can read this collection.

params.name: busId
params.description: The unique identifier of the bus.

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore data structure is designed for the Eritas Gateway bus booking application. It prioritizes security and scalability following the core design principles of Authorization Independence, Clarity of Intent, DBAC (Database-Based Access Control), and QAPs (Rules are not Filters). User data is stored in a dedicated collection, ensuring clear ownership and simplified security rules. A subcollection for user preferences is used to group all user-specific settings, making data management and access control straightforward. A top-level 'trips' collection is introduced to serve as the single source of truth for communication between the user and driver apps. A top-level 'buses' collection is added to allow driver apps to broadcast their live status, which can be read by all users.
